sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Denver-area firm's $2.9B sale to Japanese tech giant clears antitrust review
feed.summary: CSG Systems, a Denver-area firm, is being acquired by Japanese tech giant NEC in a $2.9 billion cash buyout. The deal has successfully cleared antitrust review and will result in CSG being delisted from public trading. This acquisition will merge CSG's business with NEC's Netcracker business.

feed.title: KLA Corp. rises on back of TD Cowen upgrade
feed.summary: KLA Corp. (KLAC) stock experienced a rise following an upgrade from TD Cowen. TD Cowen revised its rating on KLAC from Hold to Buy and increased its price target from $680 to $870. The upgrade was driven by the expectation that the semiconductor equipment maker will benefit from increased capital expenditures in logic and foundry, as well as a recovery in memory investment.

feed.title: Dollar Tree appoints Daniel Delrosario as SVP of Investor Relations and Treasurer
feed.summary: Dollar Tree has named Daniel Delrosario as Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer, effective immediately. In this role, he will oversee investor relations and treasury functions, reporting to CFO Stewart Glendinning. Delrosario brings extensive experience from Burlington Stores, Polar Asset Management Partners, Harvard Management Company, and Wellington Management.

feed.title: Single portal to pay taxes, utilities for 400,000 in Chesterfield
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies has partnered with Chesterfield County, Virginia, to become its sole payment processing provider, unifying all county payments for nearly 400,000 residents. This agreement will simplify the payment experience for residents, allowing them to pay taxes, utilities, and other services through a single online portal. The new system is also expected to improve back-office financial reporting and reconciliation for county staff.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Rating Increased to Equal Weight at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has upgraded Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) from "underweight" to "equal weight" and increased its price target to $164, suggesting a 3.96% potential upside. Despite this, other analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target of $194.24. The company has a market capitalization of $54.19 billion, a P/E ratio of 40.76, and institutional ownership around 99.71%.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Shares Purchased by ZEGA Investments LLC
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC significantly increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT), purchasing an additional 2,508 shares to hold a total of 4,184 shares valued at $1.996 million. This comes after Caterpillar reported strong third-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with an EPS of $4.95 and revenue of $17.64 billion. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share.

feed.title: The Biggest Loser: Tim Cook of Apple
feed.summary: The article argues that Apple CEO Tim Cook has fallen behind in the artificial intelligence race, failing to launch a proprietary state-of-the-art AI product. Instead, Apple has partnered with Alphabet to use Gemini AI software, despite Cook's prior assurances of Apple's leadership in AI. This move places Apple at a disadvantage compared to other tech giants who have developed their own advanced AI technologies.

feed.title: Newmont Mining (NEM) Elliott Wave outlook: Impulsive rally building momentum
feed.summary: Newmont Mining (NEM), the world's largest gold producer, is showing strong bullish momentum according to its Elliott Wave analysis. Both the monthly and daily charts indicate the stock is in an impulsive rally, expected to reach new record highs. The analysis suggests further upward movement as long as key support levels hold, with a wave (4) consolidation anticipated before the next leg higher.

feed.title: CI GAM to acquire Invesco’s Canadian fund business for C$26 billion
feed.summary: CI Global Asset Management (CI GAM) is set to acquire Invesco’s Canadian fund business, which manages approximately C$26 billion in assets. This acquisition will boost CI GAM’s assets under management to around C$170 billion, solidifying its position among Canada's largest investment fund companies. The deal, expected to close in Q2 2026, also includes a long-term strategic partnership where Invesco affiliates will continue providing portfolio management services for 63 funds.

feed.title: DLR: Barclays Upgrades Digital Realty Trust to Equal-Weight, Rai
feed.summary: Barclays has upgraded Digital Realty Trust (DLR) to an Equal-Weight rating from Underweight and increased its price target from $161.00 to $164.00. This adjustment reflects a 1.86% increase in the price target. The article also provides a summary of recent analyst ratings for DLR and highlights the company's operations as a real estate investment trust owning and operating over 300 data centers globally.

feed.title: U.S. Auto Industry 2025 Review and What to Expect in 2026
feed.summary: The U.S. auto industry had a surprisingly strong 2025 despite high vehicle prices and rising financing costs, with total sales increasing by 2% to 16.2 million units. General Motors, Toyota, and Ford were top sellers, while Tesla struggled with a delivery decline and legacy automakers adjusted their EV strategies due to cooling demand. For 2026, the industry anticipates a slight sales drop to 15.8 million units but remains focused on strategic positioning amid factors like inflation, interest rates, and evolving government policies, with AI set to play a transformative role.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says "Costco, I Like It"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has expressed optimism about Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST), despite its unsatisfactory performance last year. He highlighted the company's strong rally since the new year, better-than-expected monthly sales, and accelerated comparable sales in December as reasons for his positive outlook. Cramer anticipates earnings bumps and price target increases for Costco, considering it a "screaming buy."

feed.title: US Bancorp deepens capital markets presence with up to $1 billion BTIG buy
feed.summary: The provided article is incomplete and therefore a summary cannot be generated. Please provide the full content of the article.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Highlights Home Depot as the Charitable Trust's "Only Housing Exposure"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Home Depot (HD) as the sole housing-related holding in his Charitable Trust, expressing optimism about the stock despite recent analyst downgrades on homebuilders. He believes Home Depot is well-positioned for a potential turnaround in housing, especially with anticipated rate cuts. Cramer sees it as the "single best way to play a turnaround in housing" and suggests buying more shares.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Walmart CEO: "Doug McMillon Made the Stores More Appealing While Keeping Prices Low"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer praised Walmart CEO Doug McMillon for making Walmart stores more appealing and keeping prices low, which led to a 23% stock increase last year. Cramer highlighted McMillon's role in attracting a broader customer base, including the upper middle class, and his "one-man war against inflation." The article also notes that while Walmart's stock had a strong year, some AI stocks might offer greater upside potential.

feed.title: IDEXX appoints insider Michael Erickson as new CEO
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories has appointed Michael Erickson, currently Executive Vice President and General Manager of Global Point of Care Diagnostics and Telemedicine, as its new CEO, effective May 12. Incumbent Jonathan Mazelsky will transition to executive chair and retire in May 2027. Erickson joined IDEXX in 2011 and has held various senior roles within the company.

feed.title: J&J To Add 500 Jobs at New Plant, Doubling Down on North Carolina
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced plans to add 500 jobs in Wilson, North Carolina, by building a second production plant. This new drug product manufacturing facility, focused on oncology and neurological treatments, is part of J&J's $55 billion commitment to U.S. manufacturing and R&D. The company aims for all advanced medicines used in the U.S. to be manufactured domestically, boosting employment and supply chain resilience.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Launches Military-Qualified Plastic Transient Voltage Suppressors for Aerospace and Defense Applications
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has introduced its JANPTX family of military-qualified plastic Transient Voltage Suppressors (TVS) for aerospace and defense applications. These non-hermetic devices are the first in the industry to achieve MIL-PRF-19500 qualification in a plastic package, providing a lightweight and cost-effective solution with high reliability. The JANPTX product line offers protection against voltage transients like lightning strikes and ESD, with a high peak pulse power rating of 1.5 kW and fast clamping response times.

feed.title: Ecolab Inc.: How a Quiet Water-and-Cleaning Giant Became a Critical Climate Tech Player
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc. has transformed from a traditional cleaning company into a data-driven sustainability platform, helping businesses reduce water use, energy costs, and emissions. The company's integrated approach, combining chemistry, hardware, and software in water, hygiene, and infection prevention, offers measurable savings and risk reduction for its clients. This strategic shift positions Ecolab as a critical climate tech player, leveraging its direct service model and digital platforms (ECOLAB3D and Nalco Water) to provide auditable sustainability outcomes, making it attractive to investors seeking structural growth in the decarbonization trend.

feed.title: ZEGA Investments LLC Acquires New Stake in Monster Beverage Corporation $MNST
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC has acquired a new stake of 14,738 shares, valued at approximately $992,000, in Monster Beverage Corporation during the third quarter. This acquisition contributes to the 72.36% institutional ownership of the company. Despite recent insider selling, Monster Beverage outperformed earnings estimates and currently trades near a 12-month high, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating.

feed.title: Vivid Wealth Management LLC Makes New $2.50 Million Investment in Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. $LYV
feed.summary: Vivid Wealth Management LLC has made a new investment of $2.50 million in Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV), acquiring 15,289 shares. Institutional investors now own approximately 74.52% of the company, which holds an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $173.33. Despite this, Live Nation recently missed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, showing elevated valuation and leverage.

feed.title: Wealth Advisory Solutions LLC Sells 10,513 Shares of lululemon athletica inc. $LULU
feed.summary: Wealth Advisory Solutions LLC reduced its stake in lululemon athletica inc. by 53.2% in the third quarter, selling 10,513 shares and retaining 9,232 shares valued at $1.643 million. This comes as lululemon expects Q4 net revenue and diluted EPS to be at the high end of guidance due to strong holiday demand and insider Celeste Burgoyne sold over 13,500 shares. Analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average target price of $228.19.

feed.title: Wealth Advisory Solutions LLC Sells 11,439 Shares of Generac Holdings Inc. $GNRC
feed.summary: Wealth Advisory Solutions LLC significantly reduced its stake in Generac Holdings Inc. ($GNRC) by selling 11,439 shares in Q3, now owning 7,741 shares valued at $1.296 million. Despite this sale, other institutional investors like Invesco Ltd. and Norges Bank increased their positions, with institutions collectively owning 84.04% of the stock. Analysts currently rate Generac as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $196.17, citing recent upgrades from firms like Citigroup and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Vivid Wealth Management LLC Makes New Investment in Expedia Group, Inc. $EXPE
feed.summary: Vivid Wealth Management LLC has reported purchasing a new stake of 11,845 shares in Expedia Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $2.53 million. This investment comes as institutional investors collectively own about 90.76% of Expedia's stock, while company insiders have sold shares totaling $1.28 million in the past three months. Expedia currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $280.61, despite trading near its 52-week high around $291.53.

feed.title: 4,533 Shares in Expedia Group, Inc. $EXPE Acquired by ZEGA Investments LLC
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC recently acquired a new stake of 4,533 shares in Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE), valued at approximately $969,000. Other institutional investors also increased their holdings, with hedge funds and institutions collectively owning 90.76% of the stock. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for Expedia, with an average target price of $280.61, following strong Q4 earnings that beat expectations.

feed.title: 12,059 Shares in Emerson Electric Co. $EMR Acquired by ZEGA Investments LLC
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC recently acquired 12,059 shares of Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) valued at approximately $1.58 million. Institutional investors now own about 74.3% of the stock, which holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $151.06. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.555 per share, resulting in an annualized yield of around 1.5%.

feed.title: 3,076 Shares in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. $CDNS Purchased by ZEGA Investments LLC
feed.summary: ZEGA Investments LLC has purchased a new stake of 3,076 shares in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. worth approximately $1.08 million during the third quarter, bringing institutional ownership to about 84.85%. This comes amidst significant insider selling, with CEO Anirudh Devgan selling 20,000 shares for $6.8 million, reducing overall insider ownership to 0.37%. Cadence recently beat Q3 earnings estimates, reporting $1.93 EPS on $1.34 billion revenue, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $380.72.

feed.title: Truist Championship at Quail Hollow lands Charlotte auto giant as sponsor
feed.summary: The Truist Championship at Quail Hollow has secured HendrickCars.com as its first local sponsor since Truist Bank took over the tournament last year. Organizers anticipate more corporate partnerships will be announced leading up to the May 4-10, 2026 event. This sponsorship highlights growing local corporate involvement in the PGA Tour stop in Charlotte.

feed.title: Professional Basketball Player Erica Wheeler and Hologic Team Up to Champion Cervical Cancer Screening
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. has launched "Ultimate Defense," an educational campaign featuring professional basketball player Erica Wheeler, to raise awareness about cervical cancer screening. The initiative encourages women to prioritize routine screenings and engage in conversations with their healthcare providers, especially since many are behind on preventive care. Wheeler, whose mother died from cervical cancer, uses her platform to stress the importance of Pap and HPV testing as the best defense against the disease.

feed.title: New daily spray from Clorox that neutralizes indoor pollen and pet dander
feed.summary: The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) has launched Clorox™ PURE™ Allergen Neutralizer, a new line of daily air and fabric sprays designed to neutralize common household allergens like pollen, dust mite matter, and pet dander. These products utilize a plant-based active ingredient with Aller-Fresh™ Technology to change allergen protein shapes, preventing allergic reactions. Available in four allergen-free fragrances, the sprays are sold at major retailers including Walmart and Amazon, and are aimed at expanding Clorox's product portfolio into indoor wellness.

feed.title: A New Way to Stop Allergens: Introducing Clorox™ PURE™ Allergen Neutralizer
feed.summary: The Clorox Company has launched Clorox™ PURE™ Allergen Neutralizer, a new line of air and fabric sprays designed to manage common household allergens like pollen, dust mite matter, and pet dander. This innovative product uses a plant-based active ingredient with Aller-Fresh™ Technology to neutralize allergens by changing their protein structure. Available in various allergen-free fragrances, Clorox™ PURE™ aims to provide an easy-to-use solution for year-round allergy management.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Launches AI-Powered Slackbot to Enhance Workflow
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) has launched an AI-enhanced Slackbot, powered by Anthropic's Claude model, to improve workplace communication and efficiency by integrating Slack conversations, files, and channels. This initiative reinforces Salesforce's strong financial health, marked by robust revenue growth and expanding margins, despite a competitive tech landscape and high stock volatility. Valuation metrics suggest that Salesforce is modestly undervalued, supported by favorable analyst recommendations and strong institutional ownership.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) to Acquire BTIG for Up to $1B
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) has announced its acquisition of BTIG for up to $1 billion, with an initial payment of $725 million. This deal is expected to slightly impact 2026 EPS and reduce the common equity Tier 1 capital ratio by approximately 12 basis points. U.S. Bancorp, one of the largest regional banks, maintains strong profitability and acceptable debt levels, although its current valuation indicators suggest potential overvaluation.

feed.title: AI data centers get low-power memory with Microsoft RAIDDR ECC tech
feed.summary: Cadence has introduced an industry-first LPDDR5X memory IP system solution specifically designed for enterprise and data center AI applications. This solution integrates Cadence's LPDDR5X IP with Microsoft's RAIDDR ECC technology, offering high performance, low power, and robust reliability necessary for AI and HPC workloads. Microsoft is the first customer to deploy this technology, which aims to provide enterprise-grade reliability comparable to DDR5 while maintaining the power and performance advantages of LPDDR5X.

feed.title: Citigroup Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Citigroup (NYSE: C) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, January 14, 2026. Analysts are forecasting an EPS of $1.61 for the quarter. Investors will be looking for the company to not only surpass these estimates but also provide positive guidance for the upcoming quarter, as market reaction often depends more on future outlook than past performance.

feed.title: Olive & June Expands Retail Distribution in the U.S. With Debut at Ulta Beauty
feed.summary: Olive & June, a leader in at-home nail care, is expanding its U.S. retail distribution by launching its products in 600 Ulta Beauty stores and on Ulta.com starting January 18, 2026. This partnership will establish a dedicated Olive & June DIY nail destination within Ulta Beauty, offering a full range of products, including an exclusive deluxe Gel Mani System. The move aims to make salon-quality nail care more accessible and capitalize on the growing consumer demand for high-performance DIY beauty solutions.

feed.title: Baxter Introduces the Dynamo Series, a New Smart Stretcher to Help Address Common Challenges in Hospital Settings
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. has unveiled the Dynamo Series smart stretcher, designed to address common challenges in hospital settings by easing the physical and cognitive burden on care teams and improving patient experience. This new stretcher, intended for use in emergency departments, perioperative environments, and patient transport, aims to minimize patient transfers, prevent falls through advanced technologies like SafeView+, and enhance patient safety and comfort with features like a wider care surface and one-touch positioning. The Dynamo Series is set for U.S. launch in the first half of 2026 and represents Baxter's latest innovation in smart beds and connected care.

feed.title: Water stewardship win: Cabot tops global averages in CDP rating scores
feed.summary: Cabot Corporation announced its 2025 CDP environmental ratings, achieving an A- for Water Security and a B for Climate Change. The A- score for Water Security represents an improvement from its 2024 rating and surpasses global and industry averages, indicating strong performance in managing water risks and sustainable water practices. The company's consistent B rating for Climate Change also showed year-over-year improvements in subcategories, reflecting continuous progress in its sustainability initiatives.

feed.title: Pro video and music tools in one $13 Apple Creator Studio bundle
feed.summary: Apple has launched its new Apple Creator Studio, a subscription bundle offering professional-grade creative applications like Final Cut Pro, Logic Pro, and Pixelmator Pro, enhanced with AI features. Available for $12.99 per month or $129 per year, the suite aims to empower creators across various disciplines, from video editing and music production to graphic design and visual productivity, on Mac, iPad, and iPhone. The bundle also includes new intelligent tools for Keynote, Pages, and Numbers, along with premium content and a one-month free trial.

feed.title: Origin℠ AI and NXP Team Up to Accelerate Embedded WiFi Sensing for the Smart Home
feed.summary: Origin AI and NXP Semiconductors are collaborating to integrate Origin's WiFi Sensing software into NXP's i.MX 9 processors and wireless tri-radio chipsets. This partnership aims to expedite the deployment of intelligent motion sensing in smart home devices, offering faster time to market and reduced hardware complexity for new products. The embedded technology will enhance home automation, security, and energy management by leveraging existing WiFi infrastructure.

feed.title: Jan. 27 steel outlook: listen in on Nucor's Q4 2025 results call
feed.summary: Nucor (NYSE: NUE) is inviting investors to join its fourth quarter 2025 conference call and webcast on January 27, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Leon Topalian, the chair, president, and CEO, will lead the discussion, reviewing the company's results for the quarter that ended on December 31, 2025, followed by a Q&A session. The live webcast can be accessed via Nucor's website or Q4inc's event platform, and an archived replay will also be available on Nucor's website.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. Enters into Agreement to Sell Management Agreements Relating to Canadian Fund Business to CI Investments Inc.
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. announced its Canadian subsidiary, Invesco Canada Ltd., has entered into a definitive agreement to sell the management agreements for its Canadian fund business to CI Investments Inc. (CI Global Asset Management). CI GAM will become the manager and portfolio manager for Invesco Canada's retail mutual funds and ETFs, with Invesco affiliates continuing as sub-advisers for certain funds. The transaction is subject to regulatory and securityholder approvals and is expected to close by the end of Q2 2026.

feed.title: CI Global Asset Management to Acquire Invesco's Canadian Investment Fund Assets and Form Long-Term Strategic Partnership
feed.summary: CI Global Asset Management (CI GAM) will acquire the management agreements for Invesco's Canadian fund business, totaling C$26 billion in assets under management. This acquisition will increase CI GAM's assets to C$170 billion and establish it as one of Canada's largest investment fund companies. Additionally, Invesco and CI GAM will form a long-term strategic partnership, with Invesco affiliates continuing to provide portfolio management services for 63 funds through sub-advisory arrangements.

feed.title: New F5 service on Google Cloud helps manage AI app traffic, security
feed.summary: F5 has launched NGINXaaS for Google Cloud, a fully managed, cloud-native application delivery-as-a-service solution. Developed in collaboration with Google Cloud, this offering aims to simplify operations, reduce costs, and enhance the security and performance of modern and AI-enabled applications by consolidating load balancing, security, and observability. The service provides advanced traffic management, deep programmability, real-time analytics, and robust encryption features to help businesses manage their cloud environments effectively.

feed.title: Idexx Laboratories announces planned CEO succession and transition
feed.summary: Idexx Laboratories (IDXX) announced a planned CEO succession, naming Michael Erickson as the incoming President and CEO, effective May 12, 2026. Current CEO Jonathan Mazelsky will transition to Executive Chair until his retirement in May 2027, ensuring a smooth leadership handover. This strategic move aims to leverage Erickson's extensive internal experience while maintaining continuity in the company's long-term vision.

feed.title: Zhibao Technology Inc. Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Zhibao Technology Inc. announced its fiscal year 2025 financial results, reporting a 51% increase in total revenues to RMB 276.9 million but a net loss of RMB 62.0 million, primarily due to increased investment in selling expenses. The company expanded its B channels, reached over 24 million end customer users, and made strategic acquisitions and collaborations to deepen its presence in the InsurTech market. Zhibao plans to continue investing in its sales force and technology platform for organic growth and will hold an earnings conference call and investor webinar.

feed.title: APPLE INC : JP Morgan gives a Buy rating
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Samik Chatterjee has reiterated a Buy rating on Apple Inc. with an unchanged target price of USD 305. The recommendation was published on January 13, 2026, at 08:56 am EST. Apple's stock (AAPL) was trading at 260.25 USD, up 0.34%, in pre-market trading around 09:27 am EST on the same day.

feed.title: AudioEye registra 40º trimestre consecutivo de receita recorde
feed.summary: AudioEye, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEYE), uma empresa de acessibilidade digital, anunciou que espera registrar seu 40º trimestre consecutivo de receita recorde no quarto trimestre de 2025. A empresa projeta receita anual recorrente (ARR) entre US$ 39,9 milhões e US$ 40,0 milhões e uma receita trimestral de aproximadamente US$ 10,5 milhões com EBITDA ajustado de cerca de US$ 2,75 milhões. Este crescimento é impulsionado por fortes resultados na União Europeia, e a AudioEye planeja divulgar os resultados completos e as orientações para 2026 ainda este trimestre.
feed.source: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos
feed.source_domain: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos

feed.title: Cango to sell PRC business for $351.9M
feed.summary: Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) announced plans to sell its automobile financing facilitation business in the People's Republic of China (PRC) to a consortium for $351.9 million. The sale, which is part of a strategic shift, will result in Cango focusing on its new energy vehicle (NEV) and domestic vehicle transaction services. It is expected to close in the first half of 2024, pending certain conditions.

feed.title: AudioEye Announces Preliminary Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
feed.summary: AudioEye, Inc. has announced its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, reporting its fortieth consecutive period of record revenue. The company expects Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) between $39.9 million and $40.0 million, revenue of approximately $10.5 million, and Adjusted EBITDA of about $2.75 million. AudioEye attributes this growth to strong results in the European Union and will provide full-year 2026 guidance later in the quarter.
